NOT_MODIFIED: Resource not modified since last request
TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests - rate limit exceeded
FILE_TOO_LARGE: The file size exceeds the allowed limit
TOO_MANY_FIELDS: The only allowed field is the file field
INVALID_MODEL_USE_CASE: Invalid use-case for the provided model
VALID_VERIFICATION_CODE_EXIST: A verification code was already sent recently. Please wait at least 2 minutes before requesting a new one
UNDEFINED_EMAIL_AND_PHONE_NUMBER: At least the phone number or the email should be provided
USER_DOES_NOT_HAVE_VERIFIED_EMAIL: User does not have a verified email
USER_DOES_NOT_HAVE_VERIFIED_PHONE_NUMBER: User does not have a verified email
NOT_PROVIDED_EMAIL: Email should be provided by either the auth provider or manually entered
USER_ALREADY_CONNECTED_TO_THIS_SOCIAL_PR: User already connected to this social provider
EMAIL_PROVIDED_BOTH_MANUALLY_AND_BY_SOCI: An email address was entered manually, but one has already been provided by the social authentication provider. The email field must be null when an email is supplied by the social provider
ADMIN_GROUP_WITH_THIS_NAME_ALREADY_EXIST: Admin group with this name already exist
NOTIFICATION_RECEIVER_DOES_NOT_EXIST: Current User did not receive a notification with this id
POLICY_WITH_THIS_TYPE_ALREADY_EXIST: Policy with this type already exist
NO_FILE_PROVIDED: At least one file should be provided
PARENT_BLOG_CATEGORY_DOES_NOT_EXIST: Parent blog category does not exist
PASSWORD_RESET_REQUIRED: The user is required to change his password
PROFILE_COMPLETION_REQUIRED: this user is required to complete his profile
CANNOT_DELETE_LAST_API_KEY: Cannot delete the last API key of the organization. At least one API key must be maintained.
API_KEY_LIMIT_REACHED_FREE: Free tier allows only 1 API key
API_KEY_LIMIT_REACHED_PRO: Pro tier API key limit reached
API_KEY_LIMIT_REACHED_ENTERPRISE: Enterprise tier API key limit reached
